THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHIFF, TATIANA TAKAEVA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHERMAN & NATHANSON PROF CORPORATION, ATTORNEYS AT LAW THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE SERVICES OR PERFORMED SERVICES NEGLIGENTLY. THOUGH THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT COMMUNICATE ADEQUATELY WITH PLAINTIFF, THIS IS NOT A BASIS FOR A REFUND OF FEES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
